findings.evidence: Lines 18-21 declare `variable [Ring R] ... [Module R E]`, while lines 58-60 define `IsTotallyReal (J : E →ₗ[R] E)`.
findings.fix: Either specialize the API/docs to `ℝ`, or reword the module docstring to say `R`-linear endomorphism over an arbitrary ring/module and explain why the terminology is being used algebraically.
findings.issue: The module docstring says the notion is for a `real-linear endomorphism`, but every declaration is polymorphic over `[Ring R]`, so the documented scope is inaccurate.

findings.evidence: `rg` hit: `81:theorem existsUnique_add (hL : IsTotallyReal J L) (x : E) :`.
findings.fix: Add a docstring stating that every vector decomposes uniquely as an element of `L` plus an element of `J(L)`.
findings.issue: The public decomposition theorem `IsTotallyReal.existsUnique_add` is a main theorem but has no docstring.

findings.evidence: `rg` hit: `104:theorem image (hL : IsTotallyReal J L) (hJ : J.comp J = -LinearMap.id) :`.
findings.fix: Add a docstring saying that, when `J.comp J = -LinearMap.id`, the image `J(L)` is totally real whenever `L` is.
findings.issue: The public theorem `IsTotallyReal.image` is a main stability result but has no docstring.

findings.fix: Add a docstring describing the iff between total reality of `L` and total reality of its `J`-image under `J² = -1`.
findings.issue: The public theorem `IsTotallyReal.image_iff` is a main equivalence but has no docstring.

findings.evidence: `rg` hit: `119:theorem prod (hL : IsTotallyReal J L) (hM : IsTotallyReal K M) :`.
findings.fix: Add a docstring stating that products of totally real submodules are totally real for `LinearMap.prodMap`.
findings.issue: The public theorem `IsTotallyReal.prod` is the product construction advertised by the module but has no docstring.

summary: The added module has a useful top-level docstring, but several public main theorems lack documentation and the module docstring states a narrower scalar scope than the declarations enforce.
